title: Respect guests and staff
description: Please treat other guests, visitors, and team members with respect. Aggressive, unsafe, or disruptive behavior may lead to refusal of service.

title: Keep shared spaces clean
description: Please keep tables, rooms, bathrooms, terraces, and shared areas clean. If something spills or breaks, let our team know as soon as possible.

title: Smoking only in designated areas
description: Smoking and vaping are allowed only in designated areas, if available. Please follow local regulations and staff instructions.

title: Children must be supervised
description: Children are welcome, but they should be supervised by an adult at all times, especially near stairs, terraces, parking areas, and hot food or drinks.

title: Pets by prior approval
description: Pets may be allowed depending on the area, season, and house policy. Please confirm with our team before visiting or booking with a pet.

title: Reservations may have a grace period
description: Reserved tables or rooms may be held for a limited time after the scheduled arrival. If you are running late, please contact us.

title: Outside food and drinks need approval
description: Outside food, drinks, cakes, or alcohol may require prior approval. Some events or services may include a service fee.

title: Tell us about allergies before ordering
description: Please inform our team about allergies, intolerances, or dietary restrictions before ordering. We will advise you on suitable options where possible.

title: Menu items depend on availability
description: Some dishes, drinks, or seasonal offers may be limited or unavailable depending on supply, preparation time, and current workload.

title: Alcohol is served according to local law
description: Alcohol service follows local laws and age restrictions. Our team may refuse alcohol service when required for safety or legal reasons.

title: Check-in and check-out times apply
description: Standard check-in and check-out times apply to all stays unless early check-in or late check-out is confirmed in advance.

title: Guests are responsible for room condition
description: Guests are responsible for the condition of rooms, furniture, towels, keys, and equipment during their stay. Damage or missing items may be charged.

title: Quiet hours protect guest comfort
description: Please keep noise low during quiet hours, especially in rooms, corridors, terraces, and parking areas.

title: Event details should be confirmed in advance
description: For birthdays, banquets, meetings, and private events, please confirm guest count, menu, timing, decorations, and special requests in advance.

title: Decorations must be safe and approved
description: Decorations, candles, confetti, music, equipment, and layout changes should be approved by our team and must not damage the property.
